mapper.select:
SELECT a.*,s.*,dr.dorm_number FROM attendance a JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dorm_rooms dr ON s.room_id = dr.id
AND s.student_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.studentId},'%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.name},'%')
AND s.`group` = #{param.group}
AND status LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.status},'%')
AND dr.dorm_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.dormNumber},'%' )
AND date = STR_TO_DATE(#{param.date}, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY a.id
